candidates.why: Primary revenue line; matches top-line and equals Total Revenue values, listed first so used as main REVT.
Explicit total revenue line with same amounts as Revenues; included as fallback if Revenues is missing for some years.
Direct cost of raw materials; clearly a core component of cost of goods sold.

candidates.row_label: Own Work Capitalized - Cost of Goods Sold
candidates.why: Adjustment to production costs (capitalized own work) explicitly tied to cost of goods sold; belongs in COGS.

final_choice.row_label: Own Work Capitalized - Cost of Goods Sold

variables.notes: Excluded Employee benefit expenses and Other Operating Expenses from COGS as they are broader operating/overhead costs rather than direct production costs.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-type line; clearly overhead and appears populated; per hierarchy, use this single SG&A row when available and populated.

variables.notes: Did not include 'Other Operating Expenses' or 'Other operating income (expense)' to avoid mixing in non-SG&A operating items; 'Stock-based Compensation in SGA' is a subcomponent but hierarchy favors the main SG&A bucket when present and populated.

candidates.why: Explicit research & development expense line; matches XRD definition directly.
Primary interest expense line covering overall borrowing costs; best first choice for XINT.
Interest component of lease liabilities; a form of interest expense and good secondary source if main line missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of interest on finance lease liabilities; tertiary fallback for interest cost.
Specific bond interest; included as further fallback if general interest lines are not populated in some years.
Specific bond interest; similar rationale as EUR Bonds line.
Catch-all interest expense line; included as later fallback for missing years on primary lines.
Calculated interest expense line; may capture imputed interest and is a valid fallback for XINT.
Interest capitalized to assets; still represents interest cost and is included as last fallback if other lines are unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Minority Interest/Minority Interests were not used as they represent ownership interests, not interest expense. Balance sheet interest-bearing liability labels were also excluded since XINT should come from income statement expense lines.

candidates.why: Represents total equity attributable to shareholders (owners) and excludes the separate Minority Interest line; best match for book equity (BE) without double-counting non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: Did not use 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' because it aggregates both parent equity and minorities, which would conflict with separate MIB treatment.

candidates.why: Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; directly matches MIB definition for equity attributable to minority shareholders.
